statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0'); filled=$(awk -v p="$used" 'BEGIN{printf "%.0f", p/5}'); empty=$(awk -v f="$filled" 'BEGIN{printf "%.0f", 20-f}'); bar=$(printf '█%.0s' $(seq 1 $filled))$(printf '░%.0s' $(seq 1 $empty)); printf "%s | Context: [%s] %s%%" "$model" "$bar" "${used%.*}"
